---
name: Broken source link
about: Report a source URL that no longer resolves or has moved.
title: "Broken source: <url>"
labels: ["broken-source"]
assignees: []
---

## Broken URL

```
<paste the URL>
```

## Which record references it?

- **dataset**: <!-- e.g. registrars -->
- **record id**: <!-- e.g. namecheap -->
- **field with the source**: <!-- e.g. sources / docs_url -->

## What happens when you visit it?

- [ ] 404 Not Found
- [ ] 301 / 302 redirect to a different URL (paste below)
- [ ] DNS failure
- [ ] Page loads but no longer contains the cited value
- [ ] Other (describe)

## Replacement URL, if you have one

```
<paste the replacement URL>
```

<!-- A working replacement isn't required to file this issue — flagging the
break is useful on its own. -->
